title: Node v313 human approval post-echo prerequisite catalog cleanup
changes: Extracted managedAuditHumanApprovalArtifactReviewPostEchoPrerequisiteCatalog.ts as the single source for post-echo prerequisite ids, labels, and missing-evidence text.
Rewired Node v310 post-echo decision gate to consume documented-missing prerequisites from the catalog.
Rewired Node v312 governance stop/prerequisite closure decision to split completed and remaining prerequisites from the same catalog.
Added a focused catalog test that locks v310 and v312 to the same prerequisite sequence.

verification.httpSmoke: JSON 200 / Markdown 200 against the v312 closure route

conclusion: v313 is a quality cleanup version: it reduces drift risk across v310 and v312 prerequisite handling without reopening the governance feature chain.
